title: eugenia uminganensis
intro: Eugenia uminganensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, native to the Philippines, and is commonly known as the Umingan or Philippine Eugenia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eugenia uminganensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Eugenia uminganensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as poultices and ointments.
